# @codenhub/router

> Experimental browser router for app-owned rendering, path matching, history,
> annotated-link interception, and subscriptions.

Treat route values as untrusted input, preserve native links with `href()`, and
call `destroy()` to release browser listeners and subscribers.

## Documentation

- [Documentation overview](docs/index.md): Purpose, status, and starting points.
- [API, paths, and browser lifecycle](docs/reference.md): Complete exports,
  matching, history, SSR, errors, safety, accessibility, and cleanup.
